use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PATIENTS 12 YEARS AND OLDER WITH WARTS, HYPOGAMMAGLOBULINEMIA, INFECTIONS, AND MYELOKATHEXIS (WHIM) SYNDROME

indications.text:
XOLREMDI is indicated in patients 12 years of age and older with WHIM syndrome (warts,
hypogammaglobulinemia, infections and myelokathexis) to increase the number of circulating mature
neutrophils and lymphocytes.
